title: RH1 1AX, Digital Realty (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/JP3929SJ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Digital Realty (UK) Limited   Installation name: Unit 2 & 3 Redhill Data Centre (LGW10 and LGW11)   Permit number: EPR/JP3929SJ/A001   "
